# terrible_theforeman_foreman_host (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Fully Qualified Domain Name of host

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `build` (Boolean) Whether or not to setup build context for the host
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `comment` (String) Comment about the host.
- `compute_attributes` (String) Additional compute resource specific attributes. When this parameter is set, the module will not be idempotent. When you provide a *cluster* here and *compute_resource* is set, the cluster id will be automatically looked up.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Include this host within reporting
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `hostgroup` (String) Title of related hostgroup Example: A child hostgroup *bar* within a parent hostgroup *foo* would have the title *foo/bar*.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `image` (String) The image to use when *provision_method=image*. The *compute_resource* parameter is required to find the correct image.
- `interfaces_attributes` (String) Additional interfaces specific attributes.
- `ip` (String) IP address of the primary interface of the host.
- `location` (String) Name of related location
- `mac` (String) MAC address of the primary interface of the host. Please include leading zeros and separate nibbles by colons, otherwise the execution will not be idempotent. Example EE:BB:01:02:03:04
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether a host is managed or unmanaged. Forced to true when *build=true*
- `organization` (String) Name of related organization
- `owner` (String) Owner (user) of the host. Users are looked up by their `login`. Mutually exclusive with *owner_group*.
- `owner_group` (String) Owner (user group) of the host. Mutually exclusive with *owner*.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `provision_method` (String) The method used to provision the host. *provision_method=bootdisk* is only available if the bootdisk plugin is installed.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `entity` (String) Final state of the affected entities grouped by their type.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
